input_data: I absolutely loved this restaurant. The pasta was cooked to perfection and the service was outstanding. Will definitely come back!
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer expresses strong enthusiasm through words like "loved" and "outstanding" while explicitly stating intent to return.

input_data: The hotel room was dirty and the staff were unhelpful when I complained. Worst experience I've had in years.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: The reviewer describes specific negative experiences including cleanliness issues and poor service, characterizing it as their worst experience in years.

input_data: The phone works fine for basic tasks but the camera quality is disappointing compared to competitors at the same price point.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: While acknowledging adequate basic functionality, the reviewer's overall assessment is negative due to the camera falling short of competitor expectations at the same price.

input_data: Ordered a medium-sized jacket and it fit exactly as expected. Decent quality for the price, nothing special but no complaints.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer describes a satisfactory but unremarkable experience with phrases like "nothing special but no complaints" indicating neither enthusiasm nor dissatisfaction.

input_data: This book changed my perspective on life. Beautifully written with profound insights that stayed with me long after finishing it.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer attributes a transformative personal impact to the book and praises both the writing quality and intellectual depth with strongly positive language.

input_data: The delivery took three weeks instead of the promised five days. When the product finally arrived, the packaging was damaged.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: The reviewer reports two distinct failures in delivery timing and packaging condition, both falling significantly short of expectations.

input_data: Average coffee shop. The espresso was okay and prices are reasonable. Nothing that would make me go out of my way to visit again.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer uses consistently moderate language like "average" and "okay" and explicitly indicates no strong motivation to revisit, suggesting indifference rather than positive or negative sentiment.

input_data: I've been using this software for two years and it keeps getting better with each update. The developer team clearly listens to user feedback.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer expresses sustained satisfaction over two years and praises the continuous improvement and developer responsiveness.

input_data: The movie had stunning visual effects but the plot was predictable and the dialogue felt forced. A mixed bag overall.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer explicitly acknowledges both strengths in visual effects and weaknesses in plot and dialogue, summarizing the experience as a mixed result.

input_data: Terrible customer support. I was put on hold for 45 minutes only to be transferred to someone who couldn't help either.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: The reviewer describes a frustrating customer service interaction characterized by excessive wait time and ultimate failure to resolve the issue.

input_data: This gym has everything I need. Great equipment, clean facilities, and the membership price is very competitive.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer praises multiple specific aspects including equipment quality, cleanliness, and pricing, indicating comprehensive satisfaction.

input_data: The course covers the basics adequately but doesn't go deep enough for anyone with prior experience in the field.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer acknowledges adequate basic coverage while noting limitations for experienced learners, presenting a balanced assessment without strong positive or negative emotion.

input_data: Do not buy this product. It broke within a week of purchase and the company refused to honor the warranty.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: The reviewer explicitly warns others against purchasing due to immediate product failure and refusal of warranty service.

input_data: The concert exceeded all expectations. The sound quality was incredible and the band played for over three hours with amazing energy.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer states that expectations were exceeded and highlights specific positive elements including sound quality, duration, and performer energy.

input_data: It's a standard office chair. Does the job but nothing about the comfort or build quality stands out. You get what you pay for.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer describes the product as meeting basic functional requirements without any distinguishing positive or negative characteristics.

input_data: The app crashes constantly on my device and the latest update made it even worse. Uninstalling immediately.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: The reviewer reports persistent technical failures that worsened with updates, leading to the decisive action of uninstalling the application.

input_data: Exceptional craftsmanship on this handmade leather bag. Every stitch is perfect and the leather has aged beautifully over six months of daily use.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer praises the craftsmanship quality with specific details about stitching and material aging, demonstrating sustained satisfaction over extended use.

input_data: The restaurant has a nice atmosphere but the food takes too long to arrive and portions are smaller than expected for the price.
target:
Label: Negative
Reason: Despite acknowledging a pleasant atmosphere, the reviewer identifies significant dissatisfaction with service speed and value for money.

input_data: Standard shipping experience. Package arrived on the expected date in acceptable condition. No issues to report.
target:
Label: Neutral
Reason: The reviewer describes a routine transaction that met basic expectations without any notable positive or negative aspects.

input_data: This is hands down the best vacuum cleaner I've ever owned. It picks up pet hair effortlessly and the battery lasts the entire house.
target:
Label: Positive
Reason: The reviewer uses superlative language and identifies specific functional benefits that address their particular needs, expressing strong enthusiasm.
